project_privacy_data_flows.description: User shares page URL to other apps via Android share intent. URL includes provenance tracking parameter.

flow_steps.code: fun shareText(context: Context, title: PageTitle, withProvenance: Boolean = true)
flow_steps.details: User taps share action. Title and URL prepared with provenance tracking.

flow_steps.code: val shareIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND); shareIntent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_SUBJECT, subject); shareIntent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, text); shareIntent.type = "text/plain"
flow_steps.details: Article URL and display title sent to external app via Android share intent system.
